options.name: -balance_skew_groups
options.description: specifies that the new skew groups should be created by merging the specified skew groups

options.name: -constrains
options.description: indicates what the skew group should constrain - none, default or all

options.name: -exclusive_sinks
options.description: sink pins of the skew group, exclusive to this skew group

options.name: -filtered_auto_sinks
options.description: automatically determine the target sinks, from the subset provided

options.name: -from_clocks
options.description: the clocks this skew group was extracted for

options.name: -from_constraint_modes
options.description: <constraint_mode_names> the constraint mode this skew group was extracted for

options.name: -from_delay_corners
options.description: the delay corners associated with the constraint modes this skew group was extracted for ((delay_corner)+, optional)

options.name: -name
options.description: user-defined identifier for this skew group

options.name: -rank
options.description: sets exclusive_sinks_rank property for this skew group

options.name: -shared_sinks
options.description: sink pins of the skew group, shared with other skew groups

options.name: -sinks
options.description: sink pins of the skew group

options.name: -sources
options.description: source pins of the skew group

options.name: -target_insertion_delay
options.description: the insertion delay that clock tree synthesis should aim for

options.name: -target_skew
options.description: the skew that clock tree synthesis should aim for
